tiers.S: Essential / Best-in-slot for this weapon. Always consider running.
tiers.A: Very strong and recommended. Worth slotting if possible.
tiers.B: Situationally useful or a solid secondary option.
tiers.C: Minor benefit, niche, or easily replaced.
tiers.N: Not applicable / no meaningful effect for this weapon.
tiers.X: DO NOT USE — wastes slots, conflicts with playstyle, or has zero effect.

meta.note: Includes all Rise base skills + full Sunbreak skills (v16.0.0 final)

skills.name: Attack Boost
skills.description: Increases attack power.
skills.notes: Strong universally at Lv4+. Raw weapons benefit most. Elemental weapons prefer elemental skills.

skills.name: Agitator
skills.description: Increases attack power and affinity when large monsters become enraged.
skills.notes: Monsters are enraged often. One of the best conditional offensive skills in Sunbreak.

skills.name: Peak Performance
skills.description: Increases attack when your health is full.
skills.notes: Hard to maintain at full health. Synergizes with Resentment (run both for average uptime). Best on weapons with i-frames or blocking.

skills.name: Resentment
skills.description: Increases attack when you have recoverable damage (the red portion of your health gauge).
skills.notes: Extremely high uptime. Any damage that isn't immediately healed triggers it. Near-permanent with Bloodrite Qurio augments.

skills.name: Resuscitate
skills.description: Increases attack power when you are suffering from an abnormal status.
skills.notes: Situationally useful if you run status resist decos. Niche; not recommended for standard builds.

skills.name: Critical Eye
skills.description: Increases affinity.
skills.notes: Core for any affinity-crit build. Essential to reach 100% affinity on weak spots paired with WEX+Agitator.

skills.name: Critical Boost
skills.description: Increases the damage of critical hits.
levels: Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 30%
Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 35%
Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 40%
skills.notes: Best with high affinity builds. At Lv3 you deal 40% extra on crits. Diminishing returns if affinity is low.

skills.name: Weakness Exploit
skills.description: Increases the affinity of attacks that exploit a monster weak spot.
levels: Attacks that hit weak spots have 15% increased affinity
Attacks that hit weak spots have 30% increased affinity
Attacks that hit weak spots have 50% increased affinity
skills.notes: Best-in-slot for every weapon class. +50% affinity on weak spots at Lv3 is unmatched. Must-have in all meta builds.

skills.name: Latent Power
skills.description: Temporarily increases affinity and reduces stamina depletion when certain conditions are met.
skills.notes: Activates after taking damage or dealing enough hits. Stamina reduction useful for DB/Bow. Generally outclassed by Agitator/WEX.

skills.name: Maximum Might
skills.description: Increases affinity if stamina is kept full for a period of time.
skills.notes: Only active when stamina is full. DB and Bow constantly drain stamina — avoid. Great for GS/Hammer which rarely use stamina.

skills.name: Critical Element
skills.decoName: Crit Element Jewel 2 / Crit Element Jewel+ 4
skills.description: Increases elemental damage when landing critical hits.
skills.notes: Core for elemental DB and elemental Bow. Pairs with high affinity builds. Little value on raw-focused weapons.

skills.name: Master's Touch
skills.description: Prevents your weapon from losing sharpness during critical hits.
levels: 20% chance of no sharpness loss on crit
40% chance of no sharpness loss on crit
80% chance of no sharpness loss on crit
skills.notes: Requires high affinity to be effective. At 100% affinity + Lv3 = 80% chance to not lose sharpness. Useless on bows/bowguns.

skills.name: Fire Attack
skills.decoName: Blaze Jewel 1 / Blaze Jewel+ 2 / Hard Blaze Jewel 3 / Hard Blaze Jewel+ 4
skills.description: Increases fire element attack power.
skills.notes: Only run on Fire element weapons. Essential for elemental DB/Bow builds. Slot 1 decos are cheap.

skills.name: Water Attack
skills.decoName: Stream Jewel 1 / Stream Jewel+ 2 / Hard Stream Jewel 3 / Hard Stream Jewel+ 4
skills.description: Increases water element attack power.
skills.notes: Same as Fire Attack but for water element weapons.

skills.name: Ice Attack
skills.decoName: Frost Jewel 1 / Frost Jewel+ 2 / Hard Frost Jewel 3 / Hard Frost Jewel+ 4
skills.description: Increases ice element attack power.
skills.notes: Same as Fire Attack but for ice element weapons.

skills.name: Thunder Attack
skills.decoName: Bolt Jewel 1 / Bolt Jewel+ 2 / Hard Bolt Jewel 3 / Hard Bolt Jewel+ 4
skills.description: Increases thunder element attack power.
skills.notes: Same as Fire Attack but for thunder element weapons.

skills.name: Dragon Attack
skills.decoName: Dragon Jewel 1 / Dragon Jewel+ 2 / Hard Dragon Jewel 3 / Hard Dragon Jewel+ 4
skills.description: Increases dragon element attack power.
skills.notes: Same as Fire Attack but for dragon element weapons.

skills.name: Poison Attack
skills.description: Increases the rate of poison buildup.
skills.notes: Only useful on poison weapons. Status damage rarely justifies a slot on most builds.

skills.name: Paralysis Attack
skills.description: Increases the rate of paralysis buildup.
skills.notes: Only on paralysis weapons. Para is strong in multiplayer for locking monsters.

skills.name: Sleep Attack
skills.description: Increases the rate of sleep buildup.
skills.notes: Niche sleep bombing strategy. Rarely worth a slot outside dedicated sleep builds.

skills.name: Blast Attack
skills.description: Increases the rate of blast buildup.
skills.notes: Blast is one of the stronger status effects for DPS. Useful on blast elemental weapons.

skills.name: Handicraft
skills.description: Extends the weapon sharpness gauge. Will not increase past maximum.
skills.notes: Weapon-specific. Needed to push certain weapons into white or purple sharpness. Check weapon sharpness chart first.

skills.name: Razor Sharp
skills.description: Prevents your weapon from losing sharpness.
skills.notes: Good alternative to Master's Touch in non-affinity builds. DB hits so fast Lv3 = ~50% sharpness saving.

skills.name: Spare Shot
skills.description: Bow and bowgun shots have a chance not to expend coatings or ammo.
skills.notes: Bow and bowgun ONLY. Essential for Bow (saves Power Coatings). Important for LBG/HBG ammo conservation.

skills.name: Protective Polish
skills.description: Weapon sharpness does not decrease for a set time after sharpening.
skills.notes: Excellent on GS which has long guard points and natural openings to sharpen. Not ideal for fast-hitting weapons.

skills.name: Mind's Eye
skills.decoName: Mind's Eye Jewel 2 / Mind's Eye Jewel+ 4
skills.description: Your attacks are deflected less and deal more damage to hard targets.
levels: 50% chance of no deflect. +10% damage to hard targets on activation
100% chance of no deflect. +15% damage to hard targets on activation
100% chance of no deflect. +30% damage to hard targets on activation
skills.notes: Niche — mainly useful when hitting hard bouncy parts. GS/Hammer can sometimes benefit on specific monster targets.

skills.name: Ballistics
skills.description: Extends the range in which ammo and arrows have maximum power.
skills.notes: Primarily HBG — extends critical distance significantly. Allows HBG to stay further back. LBG benefits less.

skills.name: Bludgeoner
skills.description: Increases attack power when your weapon sharpness is low.
levels: +5% attack when sharpness is yellow or lower
+10% attack when sharpness is yellow or lower
+10% attack when sharpness is green or lower
skills.notes: Niche for Hammer which can intentionally run low sharpness. Not worth it on most weapons.

skills.name: Bow Charge Plus
skills.description: Increases max bow charge level by one.
skills.notes: BOW ONLY. Absolutely mandatory for Bow. Unlocks the highest charge level for massive DPS gain.

skills.name: Focus
skills.description: Increases the fill rate for weapons with gauges and the charge rate for weapons with charge attacks.
levels: 20% faster gauge fill / 15% faster charge time
skills.notes: CB: fills phials faster — near essential. Hammer: charges TCS faster. Bow: reaches max charge faster. GS: slightly faster TCS. No effect on most weapons.

skills.name: Power Prolonger
skills.description: Long swords, dual blades, insect glaives, switch axes, and charge blades stay powered up longer.
levels: Slightly boosts duration weapons are powered up
Boosts duration weapons are powered up
Greatly boosts duration weapons are powered up
skills.notes: Only affects LS, DB, IG, SA, CB. For LS, extends Iai Slash buff duration. For SA/CB, extends amp/sword mode. Must-have on LS.

skills.name: Marathon Runner
skills.description: Slows down stamina depletion for actions which continuously drain stamina.
skills.notes: DB and Bow mainly. Both drain stamina constantly during Archdemon Mode / Power Shots. Use with Constitution.

skills.name: Constitution
skills.description: Reduces stamina depletion when evading, blocking, or doing certain other actions.
skills.notes: Essential for Bow. Reduces stamina use on Power Shots and dodges. DB also benefits. No value on non-stamina weapons.

skills.name: Stamina Surge
skills.description: Speeds up stamina recovery.
skills.notes: Minor QoL for stamina-heavy weapons. Generally outclassed by Constitution/Marathon Runner.

skills.name: Guard
skills.description: Reduces knockbacks and stamina depletion when guarding.
levels: Very slightly decreases impact of attacks
Slightly decreases impact and reduces stamina depletion by 15%
Decreases impact and reduces stamina depletion by 15%
Decreases impact and reduces stamina depletion by 30%
Greatly decreases impact and reduces stamina depletion by 30%
skills.notes: ONLY for weapons that guard. LS/DB/Hammer/HH/IG/Bow cannot guard — DO NOT USE. Essential for Lance, GL, CB. GS can Perfect Guard but rarely needs Guard levels.

skills.name: Guard Up
skills.description: Allows you to guard against ordinarily unblockable attacks.
skills.notes: Same as Guard — shield weapons only. Situational even then; mainly useful against specific monster attacks.

skills.name: Offensive Guard
skills.description: Temporarily increases attack power after executing a perfectly-timed guard.
skills.notes: Triggered by perfect-timed guards. Phenomenal for Lance and CB which guard constantly. DO NOT USE on non-shield weapons.

skills.name: Critical Draw
skills.description: Increases affinity for a short time after performing a draw attack.
skills.notes: GS has a specific draw-attack playstyle that can use this. Generally outclassed in modern builds.

skills.name: Punishing Draw
skills.description: Adds a stun effect to draw attacks and slightly increases attack power.
levels: Draw attacks deal small stun damage, Attack +3
Draw attacks deal small stun damage, Attack +5
Draw attacks deal small stun damage, Attack +7
skills.notes: Very niche. GS draw playstyle only. Stun utility is minimal at endgame.

skills.name: Quick Sheathe
skills.description: Speeds up weapon sheathing.
skills.notes: LS benefits because ISS counter requires sheathing. GS/Hammer QoL. Gunners appreciate it for Wirebug moves.

skills.name: Slugger
skills.description: Makes it easier to stun monsters.
skills.notes: Hammer is the KO king — Slugger is near-mandatory. HH also deals KO. Essentially no KO on other weapons.

skills.name: Stamina Thief
skills.description: Increases certain attacks' ability to exhaust monsters.
skills.notes: Niche. Only attacks with exhaust property benefit. Mainly Hammer/HH blunt hits. Slot 1 cost is low though.

skills.name: Affinity Sliding
skills.description: Sliding increases your affinity for a short time.
skills.notes: Small slot 1 cost so sometimes thrown in. Very minor benefit, filler only.

skills.name: Horn Maestro
skills.description: Increases overall performance speed and shockwave damage.
skills.notes: HH ONLY. Mandatory for Hunting Horn — faster songs and increased Echo/Shockwave damage.

skills.name: Artillery
skills.description: Strengthens explosive attacks like shells, Wyvern's Fire, charge blade phial attacks, and Sticky Ammo.
skills.notes: Mandatory for GL (shells) and CB (phials). Strong on HBG Sticky builds. Zero effect on GS/LS/DB etc.

skills.name: Load Shells
skills.description: Improves reloading, and increases gunlance shell capacity and charge blade phial capacity.
levels: Increases ammo and coating reload speed
GL loading capacity +1, increases CB phials
skills.notes: GL: gives +1 shell = more burst damage per loop. CB: extra phials is nice. Bowguns: faster reload QoL.

skills.name: Special Ammo Boost
skills.description: Increases the power of bowgun special ammo and Dragon Piercer.
skills.notes: Bow: boosts Dragon Piercer. HBG: boosts Wyvernheart/Wyvernsnipe. Useful on specific builds.

skills.name: Normal/Rapid Up
skills.description: Increases the attack power of Normal Ammo and Rapid-type arrows.
skills.notes: Core for Normal LBG builds. Bow uses Rapid arrows. HBG Normal 3 is a strong ammo type.

skills.name: Pierce Up
skills.description: Increases the attack power of Piercing Ammo and Piercing-type arrows.
skills.notes: HBG Pierce 3 is one of the strongest ammo types. Core for Pierce HBG builds.

skills.name: Spread Up
skills.description: Increases the attack power of Spread Ammo and Spread-type arrows.
skills.notes: HBG Spread/Shrapnel and Bow Close-Range builds. Very high damage up close.

skills.name: Ammo Up
skills.description: Increases bowgun loading capacity.
levels: Expands clip size for some ammo
Expands clip size for many ammo
Expands clip size for most ammo
skills.notes: HBG and LBG only. More ammo per reload = more uptime. Essential for HBG. Bow uses coatings, not ammo capacity.

skills.name: Reload Speed
skills.description: Increases bowgun reloading and bow coating loading speed.
levels: Bowgun speed +2, bow coatings load automatically
skills.notes: LBG: essential to prevent reload animation slowdown. Bow: auto-loads coatings at Lv2.

skills.name: Recoil Down
skills.description: Reduces recoil when firing bowgun ammo.
skills.notes: Bowgun only. Reduces animation stagger after shots, increasing DPS. Near-mandatory for LBG.

skills.name: Steadiness
skills.decoName: Sniper Jewel 1 / Hard Sniper Jewel 4 / Sniper Jewel+ 4
skills.description: Suppresses the deviation of bowgun shots.
skills.notes: Bowgun only. Reduces left/right shot deviation. Necessary if your bowgun has deviation — otherwise skip.

skills.name: Rapid Fire Up
skills.description: Improves light bowgun rapid fire.
skills.notes: LBG ONLY. Rapid fire is the core LBG mechanic — this is mandatory.

skills.name: Defense Boost
skills.decoName: Defense Jewel 1 / Defense Jewel+ 2 / Hard Defense Jewel 3 / Hard Defense Jewel++ 4
skills.description: Increases defense. Resistances improve at higher levels.
skills.notes: Filler only. Defense has very little impact at endgame Sunbreak. Only consider if you're dying frequently.

skills.name: Divine Blessing
skills.description: Has a predetermined chance of reducing the damage you take.
levels: Reduces damage taken by 15% while active
Reduces damage taken by 30% while active
Reduces damage taken by 50% while active
skills.notes: Useful for learning fights. Not ideal for meta builds but solid QoL insurance.

skills.name: Recovery Up
skills.description: Increases the amount recovered when restoring health.
skills.notes: Niche. Only useful if you're healing very frequently. Synergizes with Bloodblight mechanic.

skills.name: Recovery Speed
skills.description: Speeds healing of recoverable damage.
levels: Doubles the speed of recoverable damage healing
Triples the speed of recoverable damage healing
Quadruples the speed of recoverable damage healing
skills.notes: Allows Resentment uptime. Synergizes well with Resentment builds — recoverable hp stays without healing.

skills.name: Speed Eating
skills.description: Increases meat-eating and item-consumption speed.
skills.notes: Minor QoL. Mostly filler.

skills.name: Earplugs
skills.description: Grants protection from large monsters' roars.
levels: Nullifies weak roars, reduces strong roars
Nullifies weak and strong roars, reduces powerful roars
skills.notes: Situational QoL — monster dependent. Lance/GL can guard through roars. Worth considering on aggressive combo weapons.

skills.name: Windproof
skills.decoName: Wind Res Jewel 1 / Hard Wind Res Jewel 4
skills.description: Grants protection against wind pressure.
levels: Negates minor and major wind pressure
Negates minor and major wind pressure, reduces dragon wind pressure
skills.notes: Monster-specific utility. Low cost slot 1 decos. Mostly filler.

skills.name: Tremor Resistance
skills.description: Grants protection against ground tremors.
levels: Nullifies minor tremors, reduces major tremors
Nullifies minor and major ground tremors
skills.notes: Situational against specific monsters (e.g., Barroth, Rajang). Not worth a slot in general.

skills.name: Evade Window
skills.description: Extends the invulnerability period when evading.
skills.notes: Good survivability skill. DB and Bow dodge frequently and benefit most. Lance/GL guard instead.

skills.name: Evade Extender
skills.description: Increases evade distance.
skills.notes: Great for repositioning. Helps mobile weapons stay in range while dodging. LS ISS counter positioning.

skills.name: Blight Resistance
skills.description: Grants protection against all elemental blights.
skills.notes: Monster-specific. Use situationally against monsters that heavily inflict blights.

skills.name: Fire Resistance
skills.decoName: Fire Res Jewel 1 / Hard Fire Res Jewel 4
skills.description: Increases fire resistance.
skills.notes: Purely defensive filler. Monster-specific.

skills.name: Water Resistance
skills.decoName: Water Res Jewel 1 / Hard Water Res Jewel 4
skills.description: Increases water resistance.
skills.notes: Purely defensive filler. Monster-specific.

skills.name: Ice Resistance
skills.decoName: Ice Res Jewel 1 / Hard Ice Res Jewel 4
skills.description: Increases ice resistance.
skills.notes: Purely defensive filler. Monster-specific.

skills.name: Thunder Resistance
skills.decoName: Thunder Res Jewel 1 / Hard Thunder Res Jewel 4
skills.description: Increases thunder resistance.
skills.notes: Purely defensive filler. Monster-specific.

skills.name: Dragon Resistance
skills.decoName: Dragon Res Jewel 1 / Hard Dragon Res Jewel 4
skills.description: Increases dragon resistance.
skills.notes: Purely defensive filler. Monster-specific.

skills.name: Poison Resistance
skills.description: Reduces damage while poisoned.
skills.notes: Situational. Use Antidotes or slot if facing heavy-poison monsters.

skills.name: Paralysis Resistance
skills.description: Reduces the duration of paralysis.
skills.notes: Monster-specific. Paralysis is painful but rarely needs a permanent slot.

skills.name: Sleep Resistance
skills.description: Reduces the duration of sleep.
skills.notes: Situational. Sleep allows bomb setups from teammates so sometimes intentionally skipped.

skills.name: Stun Resistance
skills.description: Reduces stun duration.
skills.notes: Universally recommended. Stun can lead to carting. Slot 1 cost is very cheap. Good filler.

skills.name: Muck Resistance
skills.description: Reduces impairments while stuck in monster muck or deep snow.
skills.notes: Very niche — specific maps/monsters only.

skills.name: Blast Resistance
skills.description: Grants protection against blastblight.
skills.notes: Monster-specific. Useful against Magnamalo.

skills.name: Partbreaker
skills.description: Makes it easier to break or sever parts of monsters.
skills.notes: Useful for farming specific parts. Not a DPS skill — purely for breaking parts faster.

skills.name: Speed Sharpening
skills.description: Speeds up weapon sharpening when using a whetstone.
skills.notes: QoL that can save your life. At Lv3 sharpening is near instant. Cheap slot 1 cost.

skills.name: Good Luck
skills.description: Good chance of increased quest rewards.
skills.notes: Farm utility only. No combat value.

skills.name: Botanist
skills.description: Increases the quantity of herbs and consumable items gathered.
skills.notes: Gathering only. No combat value.

skills.name: Geologist
skills.description: Increases the number of times you can use a gathering point.
skills.notes: Gathering only. No combat value.

skills.name: Mushroomancer
skills.description: Lets you digest mushrooms that would otherwise be inedible.
skills.notes: Niche utility. Exciteshroom mimics max potions. Mandragora recovers full health. Interesting but slot-inefficient.

skills.name: Item Prolonger
skills.description: Extends the duration of some item effects.
skills.notes: Minor QoL for extending Demon Drug, Might Seed, etc. Rarely worth a slot.

skills.name: Wide-Range
skills.decoName: Friendship Jewel 2 / Hard Friendship Jewel 3 / Hard Friendship Jewel+ 4
skills.description: Allows the effects of certain items to also affect nearby allies.
levels: Items affect allies at 33% efficacy (small radius)
Items affect allies at 33% efficacy (wider radius)
Items affect allies at 66% efficacy (wider radius)
Items affect allies at 66% efficacy (much wider radius)
Items affect allies at full efficacy (much wider radius)
skills.notes: Support-oriented. SNS and HH are natural support weapons. Not useful in solo play.

skills.name: Free Meal
skills.description: Chance of consuming a food or drink item for free.
skills.notes: QoL filler. Cheap slot 1. Mildly useful.

skills.name: Bubbly Dance
skills.description: Reduces bubbleblight and grants increased evasion when afflicted.
levels: Converts major to minor bubbleblight, increases evasiveness
Also inflicts bubbleblight when doing consecutive evades
skills.notes: Lv3 is interesting — grants evasion bonus buff during combat. Niche but fun on evasion-heavy weapons.

skills.name: Bombardier
skills.description: Increases the damage of explosive items.
skills.notes: Only affects bomb items, not weapon attacks. Purely farming/trap utility.

skills.name: Capture Master
skills.description: High chance of increased capture rewards.
skills.notes: Armor skill only. Farm utility.

skills.name: Carving Master
skills.description: Lets you carve one additional time.
skills.notes: Armor skill only. Farm utility.

skills.name: Heroics
skills.description: Increases attack power and defense when health drops to 35% or lower.
skills.notes: Lv5 is powerful but requires staying below 35% HP. Glass cannon niche. Generally risky.

skills.name: Fortify
skills.description: Increases attack and defense when you fall in battle. Can activate twice.
skills.notes: Free value if you cart. Useful for learning hunts. Not competitive in optimized builds.

skills.name: Flinch Free
skills.description: Prevents knockbacks and other reactions to small damage.
skills.notes: Lv1 essential in multiplayer to avoid being staggered by teammates. Cheap slot 1.

skills.name: Jump Master
skills.description: Prevents attacks from knocking you back during a jump.
skills.notes: Niche. IG aerial builds can benefit. Generally skippable.

skills.name: Carving Pro
skills.description: Prevents knockback from attacks while carving.
skills.notes: Pure QoL. Cheap slot 1.

skills.name: Hunger Resistance
skills.description: Reduces maximum stamina depletion over time.
skills.notes: Useful for stamina weapons in long fights. Lv3 stops the passive stamina cap drain entirely.

skills.name: Leap of Faith
skills.description: Allows an emergency dive evade when facing large monsters, extends evasion distance.
skills.notes: Niche panic button. Cheap slot 1.

skills.name: Diversion
skills.description: Increases attention drawn when attacking a monster.
skills.notes: Multiplayer support only. Rarely worth a slot.

skills.name: Master Mounter
skills.description: Improves Wyvern Riding — fills gauge easier, improves parry timing.
skills.notes: QoL for Wyvern Riding. Not worth a slot in combat builds.

skills.name: Chameleos Blessing
skills.description: Gain the power of elder dragon Chameleos.
levels: Also extends poison duration on monsters
skills.notes: Lv3 extends your poison on the monster — useful on poison builds. Wind immunity at Lv4 is great QoL. Cheap slot 1.

skills.name: Kushala Blessing
skills.description: Gain the power of elder dragon Kushala Daora.
skills.notes: Excellent on water/ice elemental builds. Lv3 healing synergy with Blood Rite. Cheap slot 1.

skills.name: Teostra Blessing
skills.description: Gain the power of elder dragon Teostra.
skills.notes: Great on fire/blast builds. Lv3 poison immunity is free QoL. Cheap slot 1.

skills.name: Dragonheart
skills.description: Draconic energy fills after losing health. Weapon loses all non-dragon elemental effects.
skills.notes: Converts weapon element to Dragon. Very niche — dedicated dragon element builds only.

skills.name: Wirebug Whisperer
skills.description: Improves Wirebug handling — extends duration and recovery speed.
levels: Also increases passive ground recovery rate
skills.notes: IG is very Wirebug-dependent for kinsect. Comfort skill for others.

skills.name: Wall Runner
skills.decoName: Wall Run Jewel 2 / Hard Wall Run Jewel 4
skills.description: Reduces stamina consumption when running on walls.
levels: Also temporarily increases attack after wall running
skills.notes: Lv3 gives an attack boost after wall running. Niche mobility skill.

skills.name: Counterstrike
skills.description: Temporarily increases attack power after being knocked back.
skills.notes: Requires getting hit. Poor uptime, incentivizes bad habits. Generally skip.

skills.name: Rapid Morph
skills.description: Increases switch speed and morph attack power for Switch Axe and Charge Blade.
skills.notes: SA: core skill — morph attacks are central to SA DPS. CB: faster phial detonation cycles. Zero effect on all other weapons.

skills.name: Hellfire Cloak
skills.description: Grants hellfire resistance and explosive hellfire power to attacks when conditions are met.
levels: Inflicts hellfireblight when monsters are enraged
Effect persists 1 minute after rage ends
skills.notes: Lv3-4 adds free explosive damage during enrage — which is also when Agitator triggers. Decent bonus damage for the slot size.

skills.name: Wind Alignment
skills.description: Gain the power of Wind Serpent Ibushi.
skills.notes: Armor set bonus only, no deco. Lv5 Great Luck is a farming perk. No combat value.

skills.name: Thunder Alignment
skills.description: Gain the power of Thunder Serpent Narwa.
skills.notes: Armor set bonus only, no deco. Lv5 Great Luck is a farming perk. No combat value.

skills.name: Stormsoul
skills.description: Strengthens thunder and dragon attack, improves elemental skills of those types.
levels: Also increases elemental skill levels by +1
skills.notes: Armor set bonus from Narwa gear. Lv4-5 give free skill levels on elemental skills. Strong in elemental builds.

skills.name: Blood Rite
skills.description: A proportion of damage dealt is converted to health when striking broken monster parts.
skills.notes: Synergizes strongly with Resentment — keeps red gauge up while healing you. Core in many Sunbreak melee builds. Gunners don't exploit part breaks as readily.

skills.name: Dereliction
skills.description: Qurio drain health but bolster attacks; multiple Qurio further boost and let you heal on Swap.
skills.notes: One of the strongest Sunbreak offensive skills. DB and elemental builds love the elemental bonus on Red Scroll. Health drain managed with Blood Rite/Coalescence.

skills.name: Furious
skills.description: Red Scroll builds fury; swapping to Blue grants temporary infinite stamina.
levels: Blue Scroll swap: temp infinite stamina, def +10/res +5
skills.notes: Infinite stamina on Blue Scroll is huge for DB and Bow. Requires Swap Scroll management. Strong with Constitution/Marathon Runner.

skills.name: Mail of Hellfire
skills.description: Decreases defense but greatly increases attack depending on active Swap Scroll.
levels: Red: defense down, attack up / Blue: resistance down, element up
Further decreases def, further increases attack/element
Greatly decreases def, greatly increases attack/element
skills.notes: One of the best offensive skills in Sunbreak. Massive attack on Red Scroll, huge elemental on Blue. Defense penalty is negligible at endgame. Core in most meta builds.

skills.name: Coalescence
skills.description: Temporarily enhances attacks after recovering from blights or abnormal status.
skills.notes: Synergizes with Dereliction — Qurio inflict blights you then recover from. Near-permanent uptime in those builds.

skills.name: Bloodlust
skills.description: Frenzy virus effects change — health drains but grants powerful bonuses; recovery grants affinity and heals red gauge.
levels: Infected: attack/evasion up, stamina down. Recovery: red gauge restored + affinity up
Further boosts + higher affinity on recovery
skills.notes: Top-tier Sunbreak skill. Recovery restores red gauge (synergizes with Resentment) and grants big affinity. Pairs with Frenzied Bloodlust for extra Wirebug.

skills.name: Defiance
skills.description: Increases defense and negates hazards when monsters are enraged.
levels: Nullifies weak/strong roars, wind, tremors, def +10
Also reduces powerful roars/dragon wind, def +20
Nullifies all roars, all wind, all tremors, def +30
skills.notes: Passive hazard immunity during enrage. Naturally pairs with Agitator. Good universal QoL at cheap slot 1 cost.

skills.name: Sneak Attack
skills.description: Increases damage when attacks hit monsters from behind.
skills.notes: Mobile weapons that naturally reposition benefit most. LS and DB frequently attack the rear.

skills.name: Adrenaline Rush
skills.description: Perfectly-timed evade just as a monster attacks grants a temporary attack boost.
skills.notes: High reward for skilled players. LS/DB/Bow regularly evade into counters so uptime is naturally good. Lance guards instead.

skills.name: Embolden
skills.description: When targeted, increases monster enrage chance but boosts your defense and evasion/guard.
levels: Def +10, slight evade i-frames and guard impact boost
Def +40, greatly improves evade i-frames and guard impact
skills.notes: Lv3 extends dodge i-frames AND reduces guard impact — good for both dodge and shield weapons. Also helps trigger enrage for Agitator.

skills.name: Redirection
skills.description: Perfectly-timed Switch Skill Swap on a monster attack reduces damage and negates reactions.
levels: Nullifies damage, auto Swap Evade backwards recovering Wirebug Gauge
skills.notes: Lv2 is essentially a free i-frame that also recovers Wirebug. Incredibly strong for weapons that Swap frequently.

skills.name: Spiribird's Call
skills.description: Receive the effects of a random Spiribird at fixed intervals.
skills.notes: QoL for lazy Spiribird gathering. Slow passive gain. Decent slot 1 filler.

skills.name: Charge Master
skills.description: Charged attacks hitting a monster increase element and status buildup.
levels: Slight increase to elemental/status on charged hits
skills.notes: Only affects weapons with charged attacks. Strong for elemental Bow (Power Shots count). GS and Hammer TCS also benefit.

skills.name: Foray
skills.description: Increases attack and affinity when attacking a monster affected by poison, paralysis, or elemental blight.
skills.notes: Good synergy with status weapons. DB with Poison/Paralysis and Foray = near-permanent uptime.

skills.name: Tune-Up
skills.description: Increases stats of custom mods attached to bowguns.
levels: Boosts Silencer and Shield. No eligible mod equipped: Reload Speed +1
Also boosts Long/Power Barrel. No mod: Reload +1, Steadiness +1
skills.notes: Bowgun only. Makes bowgun mods significantly stronger. Free Reload Speed if you don't run those mods. Strong value.

skills.name: Grinder (S)
skills.decoName: Polisher Pro Jewel 3 / Polisher Pro Jewel+ 4
skills.description: When recovering sharpness, grants a boost based on number of sharpness levels recovered.
skills.notes: After sharpening into a new tier (e.g. yellow to green), you get a raw+element boost. Pairs with Speed Sharpening. Strong Sunbreak sharpness skill.

skills.name: Bladescale Hone
skills.description: Dodge rolling to evade an attack recovers sharpness, refills bowgun ammo, or boosts Close-range Coatings.
skills.notes: LS benefits massively — ISS dodges can double as sharpening. Bowguns get free ammo refills on evade. Bow Close-range builds love it.

skills.name: Wall Runner (Boost)
skills.description: Wirebug Gauge recovers faster while wall running.
skills.notes: Extremely niche. Slot 1 filler at best.

skills.name: Element Exploit
skills.decoName: Element Exploit Jewel 2 / Element Exploit Jewel+ 4
skills.description: Increases elemental damage when attacking body parts highly susceptible to that element.
skills.notes: Essentially the elemental Weakness Exploit. Core for any elemental build. Pairs with Critical Element for massive elemental crits on DB/Bow.

skills.name: Burst
skills.description: Continuously landing hits gradually increases attack and elemental attack.
levels: On hit: temp attack +5, element +5; 5 consecutive hits = extra boost
skills.notes: Excellent for fast-hitting weapons. DB, LS, IG hit frequently and maintain stacks easily. GS hits too slowly to keep stacks up reliably.

skills.name: Guts
skills.description: Prevents fainting one time only when damage taken exceeds a threshold.
skills.notes: Armor skill only. One free cart prevention per hunt. Useful for learning hard fights.

skills.name: Quick Breath
skills.description: Switch Skill Swap removes some statuses or slows them. Health recovers when a status is removed.
skills.notes: Strong on weapons that Swap frequently. Passive status cleansing and health recovery. Good synergy with Coalescence.

skills.name: Status Trigger
skills.description: Perfectly-timed evade on a monster attack triggers guaranteed status buildup on the next hit.
skills.notes: Good for status-focused builds. Guarantees status procs after timed evades. DB with poison/para particularly benefits.

skills.name: Intrepid Heart
skills.description: Fill gauge by landing attacks; when full, negates knockback and reduces damage from one hit.
levels: When triggered, damage is further reduced and an explosion detonates
skills.notes: Essentially a free Guard Point that anyone can use. Lv2 adds bonus explosion damage on proc. Strong universal tool at a cheap slot 1 cost.

skills.name: Buildup Boost
skills.description: Increases attack when landing attacks that build poison, paralysis, sleep, blast, or exhaust.
skills.notes: Armor skill only. Exceptionally strong on status weapons — nearly constant uptime on DB and SA. One of the best Sunbreak damage skills for status builds.

skills.name: Berserk
skills.description: Blue Swap Scroll converts all HP to red gauge; you cannot faint while red gauge remains.
levels: Activates effect — all HP becomes red gauge on Blue Scroll
Slows red gauge depletion on Blue Scroll
skills.notes: Armor skill only. Core of the Berserk+Strife meta — near-invincibility combined with infinite stamina at max red gauge. One of the strongest combined setups in Sunbreak.

skills.name: Wind Mantle
skills.description: Silkbind attacks boost Wirebug recovery. Continuous attacks increase the effect. Lost on weapon sheathe.
skills.notes: Armor skill only. More Wirebugs = more Silkbind attacks = more DPS. Core in many Sunbreak speedrun builds.

skills.name: Powder Mantle
skills.description: Continuously attacking forms powder around you. Color/effect changes over time for explosive bonuses.
levels: Red powder: getting knocked back = explosion. Blue: explosive finish on attack
skills.notes: Armor skill only. Free bonus explosion damage. Lv3 with low hit count threshold is strong on fast-hitting weapons.

skills.name: Frostcraft
skills.description: Aura of frost builds while weapon is sheathed, greatly raising attack. Decreases with each hit.
skills.notes: Armor skill only. Absolute best-in-slot for GS — TCS from a full gauge is a massive one-shot nuke. Less useful on rapid-hit weapons that drain the gauge instantly.

skills.name: Dragon Conversion
skills.description: Red Scroll converts all elemental resistance to elemental attack. Blue Scroll raises resistance.
levels: All res +3 baseline. Converts resistance to elemental attack on Red Scroll
All res +5, Blue Scroll: resistance builds while attacking
All res +10, Red Scroll: higher conversion rate
skills.notes: Armor skill only. Best-in-slot for elemental DB and elemental Bow. Pairs with Dereliction to stack enormous elemental values. Core of top elemental meta builds.

skills.name: Heaven-Sent
skills.description: Activates when not taking damage for a period during combat. Lost when knocked back or far from monster.
levels: Reduces damage once, reduces stamina use. Swap recovers sharpness/ammo
Also nullifies stamina and sharpness consumption. Swap removes status ailments
skills.notes: Armor skill only. Lv3 is one of the strongest skills in the game — infinite sharpness and stamina while active. Requires good defensive play to maintain. Core in many endgame meta builds.

skills.name: Frenzied Bloodlust
skills.description: Temporarily gain an extra Wirebug after overcoming Frenzy (requires Bloodlust). Effect shrinks when sheathed.
skills.notes: Armor skill only. Requires Bloodlust to function. Extra Wirebug = more Silkbind attacks. Core combo with Bloodlust in meta builds.

skills.name: Blood Awakening
skills.description: Gradually bolsters attacks depending on how much health you regain from attacks.
levels: Adds a bonus increase to attack-bolstering effects
skills.notes: Armor skill only. Synergizes with Blood Rite (healing from broken parts) and Kushala Blessing Lv3. Strong in HP-drain builds that actively recover via attacks.

skills.name: Strife
skills.description: Increases elemental attack and affinity proportional to the length of your red health gauge.
levels: Elemental and affinity scale with red gauge length
Further increases; at max red gauge: also grants infinite stamina
skills.notes: Armor skill only. Core of the Berserk+Strife meta. With Berserk active you maintain max red gauge for peak elemental/affinity bonuses + infinite stamina at Lv3. Arguably the strongest combined setup in Sunbreak.

skills.name: Shock Absorber
skills.description: Disables damage reactions when you hit a friend or when a friend hits you.
skills.notes: Multiplayer QoL only. No value in solo play. Cheap slot 1 filler.

skills.name: Inspiration
skills.description: Grants a brief attack bonus when activating ally-affecting effects like melodies within a target area.
skills.notes: HH and SNS support builds. HH songs trigger this constantly. Great pairing with Wide-Range SNS builds.
